testcase.name: Holiday Calendar Edit Tests › TC-02-048_0001: Edit Holiday with complete data and cancel save
Holiday Calendar Edit Tests › TC-02-049_0001: Edit Holiday with data entry and confirm back navigation
Holiday Calendar Edit Tests › TC-02-050_0001: Edit Holiday with data entry, back navigation, and cancel exit
Holiday Calendar Edit Tests › TC-02-051_0001: Edit Holiday with data entry but without clicking Add button
Holiday Calendar Edit Tests › TC-02-052_0001: Edit Holiday by deleting holiday data and save
testcase.system-out: 📸 Screenshot saved: screenshots/TC-02-052_0001/TC-02-052_0001_01_login_page.png ✓ Clicked user selection using selector: text=user1 📸 Screenshot saved: screenshots/TC-02-052_0001/TC-02-052_0001_02_select_user.png ✓ Clicked login button using selector: button:has-text("เข้าสู่ระบบ") 📸 Screenshot saved: screenshots/TC-02-052_0001/TC-02-052_0001_03_after_login.png ✓ Page loaded successfully ✓ Login successful - redirected to home page ✓ Clicked Master menu using selector: text=Master ✓ Clicked Holidays Calendar Master using selector: text=Holidays Calendar Master ✓ Page loaded successfully 📸 Screenshot saved: screenshots/TC-02-052_0001/TC-02-052_0001_05_holidays_calendar_page.png ✓ Holiday Calendar Master title visible with selector: text=Holidays Calendar Master ✓ Verified on Holiday Calendar main page 📸 Screenshot saved: screenshots/TC-02-052_0001/TC-02-052_0001_06_edit_page_2026.png ✓ Edit Holiday title visible with selector: text=Edit Holidays Calendar ✓ Verified on Holiday Calendar edit page 📸 Screenshot saved: screenshots/TC-02-052_0001/TC-02-052_0001_02_edit_mode_verified.png ✓ Edit Holiday page visible with selector: text=Edit Holidays Calendar ✓ Edit Holiday mode verified ✓ Holiday selected for deletion: 0 ✓ Holiday data selected for deletion 📸 Screenshot saved: screenshots/TC-02-052_0001/TC-02-052_0001_04-click_delete_button.png ⚠ Could not click Delete button. Last error: Unknown error ✓ Delete button clicked 📸 Screenshot saved: screenshots/TC-02-052_0001/TC-02-052_0001_14_14-no_popup_found.png ⚠ No confirmation popup found ⚠ VALIDATION 1 WARNING: No delete confirmation popup found 📸 Screenshot saved: screenshots/TC-02-052_0001/TC-02-052_0001_15-click_confirm_button.png ⚠ Could not click Confirm button. Last error: Unknown error ✓ Confirm button clicked ✓ Delete confirmed ✓ Clicked Save button using selector: button:has-text("Save") 📸 Screenshot saved: screenshots/TC-02-052_0001/TC-02-052_0001_13-click_save_button.png ✓ Save button clicked ✓ Popup found with selector: [role="dialog"] 📸 Screenshot saved: screenshots/TC-02-052_0001/TC-02-052_0001_14_14-confirm_popup_displayed.png ✓ Confirmation popup found Popup content: Confirm Update Data.Are you sure you want to update this record? Please click Confirm to continue.CancelConfirm ✓ VALIDATION 2 PASSED: Save confirmation popup displayed Popup content: Confirm Update Data.Are you sure you want to update this record? Please click Confirm to continue.CancelConfirm ✓ Clicked Confirm button using selector: button:has-text("Confirm") 📸 Screenshot saved: screenshots/TC-02-052_0001/TC-02-052_0001_15-click_confirm_button.png ✓ Confirm button clicked ✓ Save confirmed 📸 Screenshot saved: screenshots/TC-02-052_0001/TC-02-052_0001_17_save_completed.png ✓ VALIDATION 3 PASSED: Holiday data deletion saved successfully 📸 Screenshot saved: screenshots/TC-02-052_0001/TC-02-052_0001_18_final_state.png === TC-02-052 TEST SUMMARY === Expected Result 1: Delete confirmation popup - Validated Expected Result 2: Save confirmation popup - Validated Expected Result 3: Holiday data deletion saved - Validated ✓ TC-02-052 test completed successfully
